A human hand hovers above a brown paper box and a stapler placed on a table covered with a white grid patterned cloth. The box is positioned to the right of the stapler. The hand begins in an open position with fingers slightly curved above the stapler. The thumb and index finger then slowly extend downward to gently grasp the stapler at its middle without rotating it. The hand slowly lifts the stapler straight up maintaining its orientation. The stapler is then slowly moved toward the center of the box and carefully lowered into the box. After placing the stapler the hand slowly withdraws upward and away from the box leaving the stapler centered into the box with no rotation. The entire human hand must remain fully visible in the frame at all times, with no cropping, no fingers cut off, and no part of the hand outside the camera view. The camera must remain completely static with no movement, no panning, no tilting, no zooming, and no change in viewpoint during the entire video. No extra or unnecessary motions are allowed, the hand must not perform any additional gestures such as turning to show the palm, posing, rotating unnecessarily. All other objects in the scene that are not being manipulated must remain completely stationary, with no position shift, no rotation, and no change in placement throughout the entire video.
